title: Oddballs, Part 1
overview: The World Conference is where countries gather and discuss how to resolve issues around the world. However, Italy is late once again. All the familiar faces show up and start off a new round of slapstick comedy!

title: Oddballs, Part 2
overview: What do we do if extraterrestrials approach Earth? America's suggestion causes a commotion at the World Conference. Meanwhile, China attempts panda diplomacy with Japan.

title: Czech and Slovakia, Part 1
overview: Czech Republic and Slovakia have achieved their long-sought independence. Is it "Czechoslovakia" or "Czechoslovakia"? The Czech Republic and Slovakia's commitment to hyphens!

title: Czech and Slovakia, Part 2
overview: After discussing the hyphen issue, the Czech Republic and Slovakia have decided to live separately. But there is loneliness in living alone ...

title: Industrial Revolution, Part 1
overview: The time is the 18th century. The world has reached a time of change. Great industry, starting with a small awareness and efficiency in Britain

title: Industrial Revolution, Part 2
overview: Unable to keep up with the wave of the Italian Industrial Revolution, Romano travels to the United States. Britain, on the other hand, sought improvements in industrial products and listened around.

title: Industrial Revolution, Part 3
overview: Industrial Revolution in Russia. Russia, which was a little late for the waves, was swayed by a changing boss. He requested that he be in Latvia in order to aim for industrial development.

title: Industrial Revolution, Part 4
overview: The United Kingdom realized that industrial products needed design. I learned from Italy, but I don't know what I'm talking about. So I decided to invite Japan as an art coach.

title: Industrial Revolution, Part 5
overview: Britain arrives at an industrial design that only machines can do. On the other hand, the United States has become the number one in the world. In everyone's car discussion, China seems to be good at it alone ...?

title: Industrial Revolution, Part 6
overview: Romano, who went to the United States, was worried about Spain and consulted. Portugal comes to visit such Spain. Somehow these two are similar ...? The Industrial Revolution edition is now complete!

title: Spa Competition and Spain's Kitchen
overview: Spa powers Czech and Hungary. To have a third party decide which is better. On the other hand, Spain, which was told at the World Congress that there are too many olive groves, insists on its importance ...?

title: Get better!
overview: I want to know a little strange festival, so I ask everyone to introduce me to an interesting festival. And Italy, who was worried about Germany's continued illness, decided to ask Japan for a spell and a prayer.
